description: Draft the Terms of Service at /terms (18 sections) including the "Apoth is a technology platform, not a medical provider" framing, FDA-status disclosure, fees + auto-renewal, arbitration with class-action waiver and 30-day opt-out, and Illinois governing law. Includes the Telehealth Disclosure and Refunds and Cancellation Policy as anchors. Carries the LegalReviewBanner.
title: Terms of Service + telehealth disclosure + refunds policy
